creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exp-run for the GNOME 3.16 update.

I'm expecting some fallout from the fact that gtk20 and gtk30 don't implicitly pull in intltool anymore.

Since I got a "413 Request Entity Too Large" error while trying to attach the patch, you can find it in my home on freefall.

SHA256 (gnome-3.16_1.diff) = c4daa39d80340c7e80056c7eb51b3375cc84157478967f494c7eb714c04a822a
